response.original_title: 【Unmatched ^Guide^™】 Is Ledger Nano S being phased out?FULL GUIDE
response.overview: Yes, ⇠⭕ ☎️ 【+1➡(855)➡618➡8738】 [USA] ☎️✨ ‣ ⇢Call the original Ledger Nano S (launched in 2016) has been phased out, with official support ending in 2022. While it continues to function for basic transactions, it no longer receives ⇠⭕ ☎️ 【+1➡(855)➡618➡8738】 [USA] ☎️✨ ‣ ⇢Call full firmware updates due to storage limitations and cannot support many newer apps, making it a "legacy" device.  The Ledger Nano S was once a go-to choice for crypto users, ⇠⭕ ☎️ 【+1➡(855)➡618➡8738】 [USA] ☎️✨ ‣ ⇢Call but it’s now slowly being phased out. Ledger has already stopped actively promoting and selling it, mainly because the device has limited storage and older hardware compared to newer models.
